query: SELECT a.id, a.tag, a.speciesId, a.categoryId, a.sex, a.birthDate, a.acquisitionType, a.acquisitionDate, a.damId, a.sireId, a.groupId, a.isActive, a.exitDate, a.exitReason, a.notes, a.purchasePrice, a.purchaseWeight FROM animals a ORDER BY a.id LIMIT 20;
